title: Amazon Basics All Purpose Rectangular Scrub Brush, 2-pack, White & Black (Previously AmazonCommercial brand)
features: 2-pack of heavy-duty scrub brushes for cleaning bathrooms, kitchens, tile, and more
Firm polypropylene bristles stand up to sustained use
Efficiently cleans and breaks down dirt, grease and grime
Non-slip TPR long handle is easy to grip and apply scrubbing pressure
Hanging feature for convenient storage and drying
Previously Amazon Commercial brand, now Amazon Basics
description: From the manufacturer Heavy-Duty Bristles Effectively clean surfaces with this essential tool, which features stiff, durable polypropylene bristles that easily break down dirt. Dynamic Use Appropriate for cleaning a variety of surfaces, the brush's specially curved design is ideal for cleaning hard-to-reach areas, tires, wheel, and more. Non-Slip Grip Featuring a contoured handle with a non-slip TPR coating, the brush can be used in wet conditions and provides exceptional leverage and grip. Cleans Tough Messes Built for eliminating tough, stuck-on dirt, mud, stains, and grime, the scrub brush offers strength in design with a durabie plastic construction. Is the bristle soft? No,it's not soft. what's the brush used for? It used for remove the stiff, dirt, grime, stain, tree sab, mud, etc from the tires.
